productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Women Solid Red Top
description: Composition Red round neck top made of 100% cotton, has long sleeves with branding printed on the chest Fit Regular Wash care Hand wash cold using mild detergent Do not dry clean, tumble dry, wring, scrub or bleach Dry flat in shade Warm iron Do not iron directly on print/embroidery For the sassy fashionista, this top from united colors of benetton has a minimalistic appeal. Graphic print on understated tops is the flavour of the moment and this top with its simplistic style and narrowing silhouette is an example of the label's versatile style. Pair this with skinny jeans, a dressy vest and closed toe pumps from catwalk. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
